description_long: This object is a compact, vintage-style gas pump with a rectangular body and rounded edges, predominantly colored in red with white accents. The front features a recessed rectangular panel and a circular display or sign at the top, which is bordered in red. A flexible hose with a yellow and gray nozzle is attached to the left side, looping around to the back where it is docked in a holder. The pump stands on a black, polygonal base that provides stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The rear side is mostly plain red, except for the hose and nozzle holder. The overall design is simple, with no visible digital displays, branding, or additional signage.
description: A red and white vintage-style gas pump with a circular top sign, hose, and nozzle, standing on a black base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed panel, circular top sign, and hose attached to the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid red side and the thickness of the pump, with the hose barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain red back and the hose looping around, with the nozzle docked in its holder.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the hose and nozzle fully, including the holder and the back panel details.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible fuel pump with a vintage design, red and white color scheme, a single hose and yellow-gray nozzle attached to the left side, and a circular sign on top. No digital displays or branding are visible.
attribute_station_signage: A single circular sign is present at the top of the pump, bordered in red, but contains no visible text, logo, or branding.
